title: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube
display_title: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube
wikitext:
[]: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Apr 20, 2020 7:52 am I don't know if this is some temporary thing, but it seems like all three Rebuild films have been posted to Studio Khara's official YouTube channel . Looks like there aren't any subtitles, yet, but it's still pretty cool.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by Rei IV » Mon Apr 20, 2020 8:10 am Thanks for the neat find! People can now watch the first two installments with the original Japanese texts/credits if they don't have the Japanese Blu-rays or have it (files) downloaded to the computers.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 20, 2020 8:17 am I don't know if there are any other post-BD fixes, but at the very least, Shinji's dumb vanishing choker is fixed, so there's that to enjoy as well.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Apr 20, 2020 8:31 am Reichu wrote: I don't know if there are any other post-BD fixes, but at the very least, Shinji's dumb vanishing choker is fixed, so there's that to enjoy as well.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Apr 20, 2020 8:43 am riffraff11235 wrote: Did we ever find out what caused it? Nice to see that it's been fixed.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Apr 20, 2020 9:17 am When you've been working on a project for a long time and are seeing it again and again, you start looking at different things than the obvious ones. This is really interesting in any case. Basically a new edition of the film. I guess at some point there will be a collection of the films or something, and it'll be the newest version of them.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 20, 2020 9:26 am riffraff11235 wrote: I'm still surprised kinda surprised that made it past quality control. Did we ever find out what caused it? Nice to see that it's been fixed.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by Rei IV » Mon Apr 20, 2020 9:35 am Reichu wrote: Part of the shot in question is used in the Q trailers, with the choker removed for... reasons. I just did a direct comparison, and the "choker-less" frames created for the trailers correspond exactly to the "choker-less" frames in the final movie. It seems an awful lot like the choker's layer was switched off for a specific interval so a version of that shot could be output for trailer use, but someone forgot to reverse the change, and it ended up getting output that way into the final movie. A pretty bad oversight no matter which way you look at it.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Apr 20, 2020 10:37 am For a good time watch them with Youtube Auto Generating English subs. Some choice examples from the launch of Wunder in 3.0: Yeah yeah yeah young man. I'm ta Yeah yeah yeah animejapan something and people also stand out After all, it moves. Eva. It was a house.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Apr 20, 2020 10:49 am Rei IV wrote: I'm actually surprised khara released the films online. Don't most companies got out their way NOT to put their films online in YouTube unless you pay $.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by Rei IV » Mon Apr 20, 2020 11:10 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: For a good time watch them with Youtube Auto Generating English subs. Some choice examples from the launch of Wunder in 3.0: Yeah yeah yeah young man. I'm ta Yeah yeah yeah animejapan something and people also stand out After all, it moves. Eva. It was a house.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Apr 20, 2020 12:16 pm Some more very funny lines: "The path of the snake is the snake" "Yes, it's a sushi restaurant" "The goal is to discontinue the comedy and make it the first machine to sell the power board level 9" "voodoo pressure is 1" "But you're aware of the tax rates. Even so for the ultimate purpose of sleeping, we only go our way" "I'm saying that you should eat a kimono and eat it. Eat all your life." "Ayanami is sneaker again" "God latency is the motto of the company" "I don't feel like going back to insects like I was when I was a student" "I just had a need for Ritsuko, because I was talking to myself as the Asuka prosecutor" "It doesn't matter. It's small and it doesn't matter. It's said to work. Shipping Delivery Buy tomorrow Cross and Stander" "It's time to enter the hot spring next spring" (Shinji to Unit 01 in hangar) "Why are you here" "Bankrupcy!" And, by far the best two: "Vodka field deployment" "Eva is moist"

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Apr 20, 2020 12:45 pm Blockio wrote: "Vodka field deployment"

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by 93rd » Mon Apr 20, 2020 5:09 pm Blockio wrote: "Eva is moist"

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Apr 20, 2020 6:23 pm 93rd wrote: I gotta know what this is in reference to, I guess I'm watching these movies again to figure it out lol.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by 93rd » Mon Apr 20, 2020 6:40 pm Blockio wrote: the scene in question

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Apr 21, 2020 11:00 am Reichu wrote: EDIT: I've made a comparison GIF (left is trailer, right is finished movie). I didn't check all of the trailers, so if there are any where the shot goes on longer, please let me know and I will adjust the GIF accordingly.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Apr 21, 2020 11:04 am It's in every Blu Ray AFAIK.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Apr 21, 2020 11:16 am I see. I was wondering if, since Funimation’s release was delayed, if perhaps they had an updated digital master from Japan. I wonder if Khara fixed that for their 4K remasters of the movies that recently aired on television, and perhaps if the YouTube uploads came from those 4K remasters.

[]: Re: Khara releases all three Rebuild films on YouTube             Quote Post by Rei IV » Tue Apr 21, 2020 3:23 pm Evangelion on 4k? Well looks like I have to buy the movies again!

Looks like there aren't any subtitles, yet, but it's still pretty cool.
